text:
Created attachment 219091
Patch file

Hi,

• Update to version 2.8.16
• Make sysutils/ansible28 a slave port of sysutils/ansible29 instead of sysutils/ansible
• Make the CONFLICTS declaration also effective with flavored ports
• Prevent unnecessary conflicts with Ansible modules (e.g. with ansible-lint)
